---
title: "Planning"
format: html
---

### Documenting process and decisions
 - keep a decision log (Steve Diggs idea that resonated with folks)


### Data Management Plans


<br>

::: {.commentbox}
::::{.commentbox-header}
Lesson Slides
::::
::::{.commentbox-body}
This is the link to the [DMP Lesson]()
This is the link to the []()
::::
:::
 
<br> 

### Other related planning topics

Software Management Plans
